name: empty-state
title: Empty State
description: The 'no results / nothing here yet' pattern: a centered region with an optional decorative (aria-hidden) icon, a real heading, supporting body copy, and an optional action. It is content, not an error — no alert role, not a live region. empty and no-results variants differ only in the copy the consumer supplies.
useWhen: A search or filter returns zero results (no-results variant)
A first-run list or collection has nothing in it yet (empty variant)
A region is intentionally empty and you want to explain it and offer a next step
avoidWhen: A system or request error prevented content from loading (use an Alert)
Content is still loading (use a Skeleton or, for indeterminate waits, a Spinner)
A blocking decision that needs a response (use a Dialog)

keyboard: The region body is static content and never takes focus
Any action passed in (e.g. a Button) is a real control in the normal tab order and is reachable with Tab
The optional icon is decorative and aria-hidden, so it is not announced
accessibility.targetSize: 44px project default for any action (inherited from the control passed in)
notes: The heading renders as a real heading element (h2 by default) so it appears in the page outline; choose the level that avoids skipping (WCAG 1.3.1 / 2.4.6).
This is expected content, not an error: the container carries no role=alert and is not a live region, so it is not announced on arrival.
The icon slot is decorative and wrapped aria-hidden; meaning lives in the heading and body text (WCAG 1.4.1).
